title: Mrs. Wiggs of the Cabbage Patch
writer: William Slavens McNutt, Jane Storm, Alice Hegan Rice
actors: Pauline Lord, W.C. Fields, Zasu Pitts
plot: The Wiggs family plan to celebrate Thanksgiving in their rundown shack with leftover stew, without Mr. Wiggs, who hasn't been heard from since he wandered off long ago. Do-gooder Miss Lucy brings them a real feast. Her boyfriend B...
